scripts.dev: npm run build -w @em/shared && concurrently "npm run dev -w @em/api" "npm run dev -w @em/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @em/shared && npm run build -w @em/api && npm run build -w @em/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @em/shared && npm run test -w @em/api && npm run test -w @em/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @em/shared && npm run typecheck -w @em/api && npm run typecheck -w @em/web
